    "functions": [
        {
            "name": "accrue_leave_balances",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.accrue_leave_balances()\n RETURNS trigger\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$ DECLARE v_current_month INTEGER := EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())::INTEGER; v_current_year INTEGER := EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())::INTEGER; v_months_missing INTEGER; v_new_accrued NUMERIC; BEGIN IF NEW.year <> v_current_year THEN RETURN NEW; END IF; IF NEW.last_accrual_month >= v_current_month THEN RETURN NEW; END IF; v_months_missing := v_current_month - COALESCE(NEW.last_accrual_month, 0); v_new_accrued := COALESCE(NEW.accrued_days, 0) + COALESCE(NEW.monthly_accrual, 1.5) * v_months_missing; NEW.accrued_days := v_new_accrued; NEW.last_accrual_month := v_current_month; RETURN NEW; END; $function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "trigger",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },
        {
            "name": "ai_database_catalog",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.ai_database_catalog()\n RETURNS jsonb\n LANGUAGE sql\n STABLE\n SET search_path TO ''\nAS $function$\n  select coalesce(\n    jsonb_agg(\n      jsonb_build_object(\n        'table', table_name,\n        'columns', columns\n      )\n      order by table_name\n    ),\n    '[]'::jsonb\n  )\n  from (\n    select\n      c.table_name,\n      jsonb_agg(\n        jsonb_build_object(\n          'name', c.column_name,\n          'type', c.data_type,\n          'nullable', c.is_nullable = 'YES'\n        )\n        order by c.ordinal_position\n      ) as columns\n    from information_schema.columns c\n    where c.table_schema = 'public'\n      and c.table_name not like 'pg_%'\n      and c.table_name not in ('app_code_counters')\n    group by c.table_name\n  ) s;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "s",
            "return_type": "jsonb",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },
        {
            "name": "ai_search_knowledge",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.ai_search_knowledge(p_query text, p_limit integer DEFAULT 8)\n RETURNS TABLE(document_id text, title text, file_name text, content text, rank real)\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n STABLE\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_content_column text;\n  v_limit integer := least(greatest(coalesce(p_limit, 8), 1), 20);\nbegin\n  if to_regclass('public.rag_chunks') is null or to_regclass('public.rag_documents') is null then\n    return;\n  end if;\n\n  select column_name\n    into v_content_column\n  from information_schema.columns\n  where table_schema = 'public'\n    and table_name = 'rag_chunks'\n    and column_name in ('content', 'chunk_text', 'text')\n  order by case column_name when 'content' then 1 when 'chunk_text' then 2 else 3 end\n  limit 1;\n\n  if v_content_column is null then\n    return;\n  end if;\n\n  return query execute format(\n    'select\n       c.document_id::text,\n       d.title::text,\n       d.file_name::text,\n       left(c.%1$I::text, 1800) as content,\n       ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector(''simple'', coalesce(c.%1$I::text, '''')), plainto_tsquery(''simple'', $1))::real as rank\n     from public.rag_chunks c\n     join public.rag_documents d on d.id = c.document_id\n     where coalesce(d.status, ''ready'') = ''ready''\n       and to_tsvector(''simple'', coalesce(c.%1$I::text, '''')) @@ plainto_tsquery(''simple'', $1)\n     order by rank desc\n     limit $2',\n    v_content_column\n  )\n  using p_query, v_limit;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "s",
            "return_type": "TABLE(document_id text, title text, file_name text, content text, rank real)",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "p_query text, p_limit integer"
        },
        {
            "name": "apply_stock_change",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.apply_stock_change(p_item_id text, p_warehouse_id text, p_delta integer)\n RETURNS jsonb\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_stock jsonb;\n  v_current integer;\n  v_next integer;\nbegin\n  if public.current_app_user_id() is null then\n    raise exception 'authentication required';\n  end if;\n  if nullif(p_warehouse_id, '') is null then\n    raise exception 'warehouse id is required';\n  end if;\n\n  select coalesce(stock_by_warehouse, '{}'::jsonb)\n    into v_stock\n  from public.items\n  where id = p_item_id\n  for update;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'item not found: %', p_item_id;\n  end if;\n\n  v_current := coalesce((v_stock ->> p_warehouse_id)::integer, 0);\n  v_next := v_current + p_delta;\n  if v_next < 0 then\n    raise exception 'insufficient stock for item %, warehouse %: available %, delta %',\n      p_item_id, p_warehouse_id, v_current, p_delta;\n  end if;\n\n  v_stock := jsonb_set(v_stock, array[p_warehouse_id], to_jsonb(v_next), true);\n\n  update public.items\n  set stock_by_warehouse = v_stock\n  where id = p_item_id;\n\n  return v_stock;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "jsonb",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_item_id text, p_warehouse_id text, p_delta integer"
        },
        {
            "name": "approve_contract_variation",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.approve_contract_variation(p_variation_id uuid, p_user_id text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS void\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v record;\n  line record;\n  next_order integer;\n  new_item_id uuid;\n  new_variation_quantity numeric;\n  new_variation_amount numeric;\n  base_unit_price numeric;\n  contract_project_id text;\nbegin\n  select *\n    into v\n    from public.contract_variations\n    where id = p_variation_id\n    for update;\n\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'Không tìm thấy phiếu điều chỉnh BOQ.';\n  end if;\n\n  if v.status in ('approved', 'cancelled') then\n    raise exception 'Phiếu điều chỉnh đã kết thúc, không thể duyệt lại.';\n  end if;\n\n  update public.contract_variations\n    set status = 'approved',\n        approved_by = p_user_id,\n        approved_at = now(),\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = p_variation_id;\n\n  if v.contract_type = 'customer' then\n    select project_id::text into contract_project_id\n      from public.customer_contracts\n      where id = v.contract_id;\n  elsif v.contract_type = 'subcontractor' then\n    select project_id::text into contract_project_id\n      from public.subcontractor_contracts\n      where id = v.contract_id;\n  end if;\n\n  for line in\n    select *\n      from public.contract_variation_items\n      where variation_id = p_variation_id\n      order by created_at asc\n  loop\n    if line.contract_item_id is not null then\n      select\n        coalesce(variation_quantity, 0) + coalesce(line.quantity_delta, 0),\n        coalesce(variation_amount, 0) + coalesce(line.amount_delta, 0),\n        coalesce(line.after_unit_price, revised_unit_price, unit_price)\n        into new_variation_quantity, new_variation_amount, base_unit_price\n        from public.contract_items\n        where id = line.contract_item_id\n        for update;\n\n      update public.contract_items\n        set variation_quantity = new_variation_quantity,\n            variation_amount = new_variation_amount,\n            revised_quantity = coalesce(quantity, 0) + new_variation_quantity,\n            revised_unit_price = base_unit_price,\n            revised_total_price = coalesce(total_price, 0) + new_variation_amount\n        where id = line.contract_item_id;\n    else\n      select coalesce(max(\"order\"), 0) + 1\n        into next_order\n        from public.contract_items\n        where contract_id = v.contract_id\n          and contract_type = v.contract_type;\n\n      insert into public.contract_items (\n        contract_id, contract_type, project_id, construction_site_id,\n        code, name, unit, quantity, unit_price, total_price,\n        original_quantity, original_unit_price, original_total_price,\n        variation_quantity, variation_amount, revised_quantity,\n        revised_unit_price, revised_total_price,\n        description, category, brand, origin, technical_spec,\n        length, width, height,\n        material_unit_price, labor_unit_price, machine_unit_price,\n        work_code, \"order\", note\n      )\n      values (\n        v.contract_id, v.contract_type, contract_project_id, v.construction_site_id,\n        line.code, line.name, line.unit,\n        0, coalesce(line.unit_price, line.after_unit_price, 0), 0,\n        0, coalesce(line.unit_price, line.after_unit_price, 0), 0,\n        coalesce(line.quantity_delta, line.after_quantity, 0),\n        coalesce(line.amount_delta, line.after_amount, 0),\n        coalesce(line.quantity_delta, line.after_quantity, 0),\n        coalesce(line.after_unit_price, line.unit_price, 0),\n        coalesce(line.amount_delta, line.after_amount, 0),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'description', ''),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'category', ''),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'brand', ''),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'origin', ''),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'technicalSpec', ''),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'length', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'width', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'height', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'materialUnitPrice', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'laborUnitPrice', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(line.metadata->>'machineUnitPrice', '')::numeric, 0),\n        nullif(line.metadata->>'workCode', ''),\n        next_order,\n        'Tạo từ điều chỉnh BOQ ' || v.code\n      )\n      returning id into new_item_id;\n\n      update public.contract_variation_items\n        set contract_item_id = new_item_id,\n            before_quantity = coalesce(before_quantity, 0),\n            after_quantity = coalesce(after_quantity, quantity_delta, 0),\n            before_amount = coalesce(before_amount, 0),\n            after_amount = coalesce(after_amount, amount_delta, 0)\n        where id = line.id;\n    end if;\n  end loop;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "void",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "p_variation_id uuid, p_user_id text"
        },

        {
            "name": "create_asset_with_initial_stock",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_asset_with_initial_stock(p_asset jsonb)\n RETURNS assets\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_asset public.assets%rowtype;\n  v_stock_id text;\n  v_qty integer;\n  v_warehouse_id text := nullif(p_asset->>'warehouse_id', '');\nbegin\n  if not public.is_module_admin('TS') then\n    raise exception 'insufficient privilege to create asset';\n  end if;\n\n  v_qty := greatest(\n    1,\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'quantity', '')::integer, 1)\n  );\n  if coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'asset_type', ''), 'single') <> 'batch' then\n    v_qty := 1;\n  end if;\n\n  insert into public.assets (\n    id, code, name, category_id, brand, model, serial_number, status,\n    asset_type, quantity, unit, parent_id, child_index, is_bundle,\n    managed_by_user_id, managing_dept_id, construction_site_id,\n    supplier_id, contract_number, invoice_number, asset_origin,\n    is_fixed_asset, is_leased, leased_from, lease_end_date,\n    warranty_condition, warranty_provider, warranty_contact,\n    original_value, purchase_date, depreciation_years, warranty_months,\n    residual_value, warehouse_id, location_note, assigned_to_user_id,\n    assigned_to_name, assigned_date, disposal_date, disposal_value,\n    disposal_note, image_url, note, created_at, updated_at\n  )\n  values (\n    p_asset->>'id',\n    p_asset->>'code',\n    p_asset->>'name',\n    nullif(p_asset->>'category_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'brand', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'model', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'serial_number', ''),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'status', ''), 'AVAILABLE')::public.asset_status,\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'asset_type', ''), 'single'),\n    v_qty,\n    nullif(p_asset->>'unit', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'parent_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'child_index', '')::integer,\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'is_bundle', '')::boolean, false),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'managed_by_user_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'managing_dept_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'construction_site_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'supplier_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'contract_number', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'invoice_number', ''),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'asset_origin', ''), 'purchase'),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'is_fixed_asset', '')::boolean, true),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'is_leased', '')::boolean, false),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'leased_from', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'lease_end_date', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'warranty_condition', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'warranty_provider', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'warranty_contact', ''),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'original_value', '')::numeric, 0),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'purchase_date', ''), now()::date::text),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'depreciation_years', '')::integer, 5),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'warranty_months', '')::integer, 0),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'residual_value', '')::numeric, 0),\n    v_warehouse_id,\n    nullif(p_asset->>'location_note', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'assigned_to_user_id', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'assigned_to_name', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'assigned_date', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'disposal_date', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'disposal_value', '')::numeric,\n    nullif(p_asset->>'disposal_note', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'image_url', ''),\n    nullif(p_asset->>'note', ''),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'created_at', '')::timestamp with time zone, now()),\n    coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'updated_at', '')::timestamp with time zone, now())\n  )\n  returning * into v_asset;\n\n  if v_warehouse_id is not null then\n    select id into v_stock_id\n    from public.asset_location_stocks\n    where asset_id = v_asset.id\n      and warehouse_id is not distinct from v_warehouse_id\n      and assigned_to_user_id is null\n    limit 1\n    for update;\n\n    if v_stock_id is null then\n      insert into public.asset_location_stocks (\n        asset_id, warehouse_id, qty, note, updated_at\n      )\n      values (\n        v_asset.id, v_warehouse_id, v_qty,\n        nullif(p_asset->>'location_note', ''), now()\n      );\n    else\n      update public.asset_location_stocks\n      set qty = qty + v_qty,\n          note = coalesce(nullif(p_asset->>'location_note', ''), note),\n          updated_at = now()\n      where id = v_stock_id;\n    end if;\n  end if;\n\n  return v_asset;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "assets",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_asset jsonb"
        },
        {
            "name": "current_app_user_id",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.current_app_user_id()\n RETURNS uuid\n LANGUAGE sql\n STABLE SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO ''\nAS $function$\n  select u.id\n  from public.users u\n  where u.auth_id = (select auth.uid())\n     or (\n       u.auth_id is null\n       and lower(u.email) = lower(coalesce((select auth.jwt() ->> 'email'), ''))\n     )\n  order by case when u.auth_id = (select auth.uid()) then 0 else 1 end\n  limit 1;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "s",
            "return_type": "uuid",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },
        {
            "name": "daily_log_user_has_project_permission",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.daily_log_user_has_project_permission(p_user_id text, p_project_id text, p_construction_site_id text, p_permission_code text)\n RETURNS boolean\n LANGUAGE sql\n STABLE SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO ''\nAS $function$\n  select exists (\n    select 1\n    from public.users u\n    where u.id::text = p_user_id\n      and u.role = 'ADMIN'\n      and coalesce(u.is_active, true)\n  )\n  or exists (\n    select 1\n    from public.project_staff ps\n    join public.project_staff_permissions psp\n      on psp.staff_id = ps.id\n     and coalesce(psp.is_active, true)\n    join public.project_permission_types ppt\n      on ppt.id = psp.permission_type_id\n     and ppt.code = p_permission_code\n     and coalesce(ppt.is_active, true)\n    where ps.user_id::text = p_user_id\n      and ps.end_date is null\n      and (\n        (p_project_id is not null and ps.project_id::text = p_project_id)\n        or (p_construction_site_id is not null and ps.construction_site_id::text = p_construction_site_id)\n      )\n  );\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "s",
            "return_type": "boolean",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_user_id text, p_project_id text, p_construction_site_id text, p_permission_code text"
        },
        {
            "name": "execute_ai_query",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.execute_ai_query(query_text text)\n RETURNS json\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\nDECLARE\n  result JSON;\n  upper_query TEXT;\n  clean_query TEXT;\nBEGIN\n  -- Strip trailing semicolons and whitespace\n  clean_query := RTRIM(TRIM(query_text), ';');\n  clean_query := TRIM(clean_query);\n  \n  -- Safety check: only allow SELECT and WITH (CTE)\n  upper_query := UPPER(clean_query);\n  IF NOT (upper_query LIKE 'SELECT%' OR upper_query LIKE 'WITH%') THEN\n    RETURN json_build_object('error', 'Only SELECT queries are allowed');\n  END IF;\n  \n  -- Block dangerous keywords using word-boundary regex\n  IF upper_query ~ '\\y(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP|ALTER|CREATE|TRUNCATE|GRANT|REVOKE|EXEC|EXECUTE)\\y' THEN\n    RETURN json_build_object('error', 'Dangerous keywords detected');\n  END IF;\n\n  -- Block multiple statements (prevent SQL injection via semicolons)\n  IF clean_query LIKE '%;%' THEN\n    RETURN json_build_object('error', 'Multiple statements are not allowed');\n  END IF;\n  \n  -- Execute and return as JSON\n  EXECUTE 'SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (' || clean_query || ') t' INTO result;\n  \n  -- Handle null result (no rows)\n  IF result IS NULL THEN\n    result := '[]'::json;\n  END IF;\n  \n  RETURN result;\nEXCEPTION\n  WHEN OTHERS THEN\n    RETURN json_build_object('error', SQLERRM);\nEND;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "json",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "query_text text"
        },
        {
            "name": "execute_ai_readonly_query",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.execute_ai_readonly_query(p_query text)\n RETURNS jsonb\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_sql text := trim(coalesce(p_query, ''));\n  v_lower text;\n  v_rows jsonb;\n  v_row_count integer;\nbegin\n  v_sql := regexp_replace(v_sql, ';\\s*$', '');\n  v_lower := lower(v_sql);\n\n  if v_sql = '' or v_lower !~ '^\\s*(select|with)\\s' then\n    raise exception 'AI query must be SELECT-only';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_sql like '%;%' then\n    raise exception 'AI query must contain a single statement';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_sql ~ '(--|/\\*)' then\n    raise exception 'AI query comments are not allowed';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_lower ~ '(^|[^a-z_])(insert|update|delete|drop|alter|truncate|grant|revoke|create|replace|merge|call|copy|do|execute|notify|listen|vacuum|analyze|set|reset|refresh)([^a-z_]|$)' then\n    raise exception 'AI query contains a blocked keyword';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_lower ~ '(^|[^a-z_])(auth|storage|vault|net|extensions|pg_catalog|information_schema)\\s*\\.' then\n    raise exception 'AI query references a blocked schema';\n  end if;\n\n  perform set_config('statement_timeout', '5000', true);\n\n  execute format(\n    'select coalesce(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(ai_limited)), ''[]''::jsonb)\n       from (select * from (%s) ai_source limit 500) ai_limited',\n    v_sql\n  )\n  into v_rows;\n\n  v_row_count := coalesce(jsonb_array_length(v_rows), 0);\n  return jsonb_build_object(\n    'rows', v_rows,\n    'rowCount', v_row_count,\n    'limited', v_row_count >= 500\n  );\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "jsonb",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "p_query text"
        },
        {
            "name": "execute_readonly_query",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.execute_readonly_query(query_text text)\n RETURNS jsonb\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\nDECLARE\n  result jsonb;\nBEGIN\n  -- Only allow SELECT statements\n  IF NOT (lower(trim(query_text)) LIKE 'select%' OR lower(trim(query_text)) LIKE 'with%') THEN\n    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Only SELECT queries are allowed';\n  END IF;\n  \n  -- Block dangerous keywords\n  IF query_text ~* '\\b(insert|update|delete|drop|alter|truncate|create|grant|revoke)\\b' THEN\n    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Write operations are not allowed';\n  END IF;\n\n  EXECUTE 'SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (' || query_text || ') t' INTO result;\n  RETURN COALESCE(result, '[]'::jsonb);\nEND;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "jsonb",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "query_text text"
        },

        {
            "name": "match_ai_memories",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.match_ai_memories(query_embedding vector, match_count integer DEFAULT 10, match_threshold double precision DEFAULT 0.3, filter_user_id text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, content text, category text, topics text[], importance integer, similarity double precision)\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$\nBEGIN\n  RETURN QUERY\n  SELECT\n    m.id,\n    m.content,\n    m.category,\n    m.topics,\n    m.importance,\n    1 - (m.embedding <=> query_embedding) AS similarity\n  FROM ai_memory m\n  WHERE m.embedding IS NOT NULL\n    AND 1 - (m.embedding <=> query_embedding) > match_threshold\n    AND (filter_user_id IS NULL OR m.user_id = filter_user_id OR m.user_id = 'system')\n  ORDER BY m.importance DESC, similarity DESC\n  LIMIT match_count;\nEND;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "TABLE(id uuid, content text, category text, topics text[], importance integer, similarity double precision)",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "query_embedding vector, match_count integer, match_threshold double precision, filter_user_id text"
        },
        {
            "name": "match_query_cache",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.match_query_cache(query_embedding vector, match_count integer DEFAULT 3, match_threshold double precision DEFAULT 0.85)\n RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, question text, sql_query text, answer text, hit_count integer, score double precision, similarity double precision)\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$\nBEGIN\n  RETURN QUERY\n  SELECT\n    c.id,\n    c.question,\n    c.sql_query,\n    c.answer,\n    c.hit_count,\n    c.score,\n    1 - (c.embedding <=> query_embedding) AS similarity\n  FROM ai_query_cache c\n  WHERE c.embedding IS NOT NULL\n    AND c.score > 0\n    AND 1 - (c.embedding <=> query_embedding) > match_threshold\n  ORDER BY similarity DESC\n  LIMIT match_count;\nEND;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "TABLE(id uuid, question text, sql_query text, answer text, hit_count integer, score double precision, similarity double precision)",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "query_embedding vector, match_count integer, match_threshold double precision"
        },
        {
            "name": "match_rag_chunks",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.match_rag_chunks(query_embedding vector, match_count integer DEFAULT 5, match_threshold double precision DEFAULT 0.3)\n RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, document_id uuid, content text, metadata jsonb, similarity double precision)\n LANGUAGE sql\n STABLE\nAS $function$\n  SELECT\n    rc.id, rc.document_id, rc.content, rc.metadata,\n    1 - (rc.embedding <=> query_embedding) as similarity\n  FROM rag_chunks rc\n  JOIN rag_documents rd ON rc.document_id = rd.id\n  WHERE rd.status = 'ready'\n    AND 1 - (rc.embedding <=> query_embedding) > match_threshold\n  ORDER BY rc.embedding <=> query_embedding\n  LIMIT match_count;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "s",
            "return_type": "TABLE(id uuid, document_id uuid, content text, metadata jsonb, similarity double precision)",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "query_embedding vector, match_count integer, match_threshold double precision"
        },
        {
            "name": "next_asset_code",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.next_asset_code()\n RETURNS text\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_next integer;\n  v_code text;\nbegin\n  perform pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext('public.next_asset_code'));\n\n  select coalesce(max(substring(code from '^TS-([0-9]+)$')::integer), 0) + 1\n    into v_next\n  from public.assets\n  where code ~ '^TS-[0-9]+$';\n\n  loop\n    v_code := 'TS-' || lpad(v_next::text, 3, '0');\n    exit when not exists (select 1 from public.assets where code = v_code);\n    v_next := v_next + 1;\n  end loop;\n\n  return v_code;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "text",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },
        {
            "name": "next_asset_transfer_code",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.next_asset_transfer_code()\n RETURNS text\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_year integer := extract(year from now())::integer;\n  v_existing integer;\n  v_next integer;\nbegin\n  select coalesce(max(substring(code from ('^DC-' || v_year || '-([0-9]+)$'))::integer), 0)\n    into v_existing\n  from public.asset_transfers\n  where code ~ ('^DC-' || v_year || '-[0-9]+$');\n\n  insert into public.app_code_counters(scope, year, value)\n  values ('DC', v_year, v_existing + 1)\n  on conflict (scope, year) do update\n    set value = greatest(public.app_code_counters.value + 1, excluded.value),\n        updated_at = now()\n  returning value into v_next;\n\n  return 'DC-' || v_year || '-' || lpad(v_next::text, 3, '0');\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "text",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },

            "name": "next_request_code",

            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.next_request_code()\n RETURNS text\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_year integer := extract(year from now())::integer;\n  v_existing integer;\n  v_next integer;\nbegin\n  select coalesce(max(substring(code from ('^REQ-' || v_year || '-([0-9]+)$'))::integer), 0)\n    into v_existing\n  from public.request_instances\n  where code ~ ('^REQ-' || v_year || '-[0-9]+$');\n\n  insert into public.app_code_counters(scope, year, value)\n  values ('REQ', v_year, v_existing + 1)\n  on conflict (scope, year) do update\n    set value = greatest(public.app_code_counters.value + 1, excluded.value),\n        updated_at = now()\n  returning value into v_next;\n\n  return 'REQ-' || v_year || '-' || lpad(v_next::text, 3, '0');\nend;\n$function$\n",

            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.next_workflow_code()\n RETURNS text\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_year integer := extract(year from now())::integer;\n  v_existing integer;\n  v_next integer;\nbegin\n  select coalesce(max(substring(code from ('^WF-' || v_year || '-([0-9]+)$'))::integer), 0)\n    into v_existing\n  from public.workflow_instances\n  where code ~ ('^WF-' || v_year || '-[0-9]+$');\n\n  insert into public.app_code_counters(scope, year, value)\n  values ('WF', v_year, v_existing + 1)\n  on conflict (scope, year) do update\n    set value = greatest(public.app_code_counters.value + 1, excluded.value),\n        updated_at = now()\n  returning value into v_next;\n\n  return 'WF-' || v_year || '-' || lpad(v_next::text, 3, '0');\nend;\n$function$\n",

        {
            "name": "process_request_step",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.process_request_step(p_request_id uuid, p_user_id uuid, p_action text, p_comment text DEFAULT ''::text)\n RETURNS request_instances\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_req public.request_instances%rowtype;\n  v_current_user uuid := public.current_app_user_id();\n  v_step jsonb;\n  v_step_ord bigint;\n  v_approvers jsonb;\n  v_all_approved boolean;\n  v_status text;\n  v_step_order integer;\nbegin\n  if v_current_user is null then\n    raise exception 'authentication required';\n  end if;\n  if p_user_id is distinct from v_current_user and not public.is_module_admin('RQ') then\n    raise exception 'cannot act as another user';\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_req\n  from public.request_instances\n  where id = p_request_id\n  for update;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'request not found: %', p_request_id;\n  end if;\n  if v_req.status not in ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') then\n    raise exception 'request is not waiting for approval';\n  end if;\n\n  select elem, ord\n    into v_step, v_step_ord\n  from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(v_req.approvers, '[]'::jsonb)) with ordinality as e(elem, ord)\n  where elem->>'status' = 'waiting'\n  order by coalesce((elem->>'order')::integer, ord::integer)\n  limit 1;\n\n  if v_step is null then\n    raise exception 'no waiting approver';\n  end if;\n  if v_step->>'userId' <> p_user_id::text and not public.is_module_admin('RQ') then\n    raise exception 'user is not the current approver';\n  end if;\n\n  v_step_order := coalesce((v_step->>'order')::integer, v_step_ord::integer);\n\n  if upper(p_action) = 'APPROVED' then\n    select jsonb_agg(\n      case when ord = v_step_ord then\n        elem || jsonb_build_object(\n          'status', 'approved',\n          'comment', coalesce(nullif(p_comment, ''), 'Đã duyệt'),\n          'actedAt', now()::text\n        )\n      else elem end\n      order by ord\n    )\n      into v_approvers\n    from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(v_req.approvers, '[]'::jsonb)) with ordinality as e(elem, ord);\n\n    v_all_approved := not exists (\n      select 1 from jsonb_array_elements(v_approvers) e(elem)\n      where elem->>'status' = 'waiting'\n    );\n    v_status := case when v_all_approved then 'APPROVED' else 'PENDING' end;\n\n    update public.request_instances\n    set approvers = v_approvers,\n        status = v_status,\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = p_request_id\n    returning * into v_req;\n\n    insert into public.request_logs(request_id, action, acted_by, comment)\n    values (\n      p_request_id,\n      'APPROVED',\n      p_user_id,\n      coalesce(nullif(p_comment, ''), 'Duyệt bước ' || v_step_order::text)\n    );\n  elsif upper(p_action) = 'REJECTED' then\n    select jsonb_agg(\n      case when ord = v_step_ord then\n        elem || jsonb_build_object(\n          'status', from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(v_req.approvers, '[]'::jsonb)) with ordinality as e(elem, ord);\n\n    update public.request_instances\n    set approvers = v_approvers,\n        status = 'REJECTED',\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = p_request_id\n    returning * into v_req;\n\n    insert into public.request_logs(request_id, action, acted_by, comment)\n    values (\n      p_request_id,\n      'REJECTED',\n      p_user_id,\n      coalesce(nullif(p_comment, ''), 'Từ chối ở bước ' || v_step_order::text)\n    );\n  else\n    raise exception 'unsupported request action: %',         {
            "name": "process_transaction_status",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.process_transaction_status(p_transaction_id text, p_status transaction_status, p_approver_id uuid)\n RETURNS transactions\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_tx public.transactions%rowtype;\n  v_user public.users%rowtype;\n  v_line jsonb;\n  v_pending jsonb;\n  v_item_id text;\n  v_qty integer;\n  v_can_approve boolean := false;\n  v_can_complete boolean := false;\nbegin\n  select * into v_tx\n  from public.transactions\n  where id = p_transaction_id\n  for update;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'transaction not found: %', p_transaction_id;\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_user from public.users where id = public.current_app_user_id();\n  if v_user.id is null then\n    raise exception 'authentication required';\n  end if;\n\n  v_can_approve :=\n    public.is_module_admin('WMS')\n    or (\n      v_user.role = 'WAREHOUSE_KEEPER'\n      and (\n        v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is null\n        or (v_tx.type = 'IMPORT'::public.transaction_type and v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is not distinct from v_tx.target_warehouse_id)\n        or (v_tx.type in ('EXPORT'::public.transaction_type, 'LIQUIDATION'::public.transaction_type, 'TRANSFER'::public.transaction_type)\n            and v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is not distinct from v_tx.source_warehouse_id)\n      )\n    );\n\n  v_can_complete :=\n    public.is_module_admin('WMS')\n    or (\n      v_user.role = 'WAREHOUSE_KEEPER'\n      and (\n        v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is null\n        or (v_tx.type in ('IMPORT'::public.transaction_type, 'TRANSFER'::public.transaction_type)\n            and v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is not distinct from v_tx.target_warehouse_id)\n        or (v_tx.type in ('EXPORT'::public.transaction_type, 'LIQUIDATION'::public.transaction_type)\n            and v_user.assigned_warehouse_id is not distinct from v_tx.source_warehouse_id)\n      )\n    );\n\n  if p_status = 'APPROVED'::public.transaction_status and not v_can_approve then\n    raise exception 'insufficient privilege to approve transaction';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status = 'CANCELLED'::public.transaction_status\n     and not v_can_approve\n     and v_tx.requester_id is distinct from v_user.id then\n    raise exception 'insufficient privilege to cancel transaction';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status = 'COMPLETED'::public.transaction_status and not v_can_complete then\n    raise exception 'insufficient privilege to complete transaction';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_tx.status = p_status then\n    return v_tx;\n  end if;\n  if v_tx.status = 'CANCELLED'::public.transaction_status then\n    raise exception 'cancelled transaction cannot be changed';\n  end if;\n  if v_tx.status = 'COMPLETED'::public.transaction_status then\n    raise exception 'completed transaction cannot be changed';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status in ('APPROVED'::public.transaction_status, 'COMPLETED'::public.transaction_status) then\n    for v_pending in\n      select value from jsonb_array_elements(coalesce(v_tx.pending_items, '[]'::jsonb))\n    loop\n      insert into public.items (\n        id, sku, name, category, unit, purchase_unit,\n        price_in, price_out, min_stock, supplier_id, image_url,\n        stock_by_warehouse, location\n      )\n      values (\n        v_pending->>'id',\n        v_pending->>'sku',\n        v_pending->>'name',\n        coalesce(nullif(v_pending->>'category', ''), 'Khác'),\n        coalesce(nullif(v_pending->>'unit', ''), 'Cái'),\n        nullif(v_pending->>'purchaseUnit', ''),\n        coalesce(nullif(v_pending->>'priceIn', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(v_pending->>'priceOut', '')::numeric, 0),\n        coalesce(nullif(v_pending->>'minStock', '')::integer, 0),\n        nullif(v_pending->>'supplierId', ''),\n        nullif(v_pending->>'imageUrl', ''),\n        coalesce(v_pending->'stockByWarehouse', '{}'::jsonb),\n        nullif(v_pending->>'location', '')\n      )\n      on conflict (id) do nothing;\n    end loop;\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status = 'COMPLETED'::public.transaction_status then\n    for v_line in\n      select value from jsonb_array_elements(v_tx.items)\n    loop\n      v_item_id := v_line->>'itemId';\n      v_qty := coalesce(nullif(v_line->>'quantity', '')::numeric, 0)::integer;\n      if v_item_id is null or v_qty <= 0 then\n        raise exception 'invalid transaction item payload';\n      end if;\n\n      if v_tx.type = 'IMPORT'::public.transaction_type then\n        perform public.apply_stock_change(v_item_id, v_tx.target_warehouse_id, v_qty);\n      elsif v_tx.type in ('EXPORT'::public.transaction_type, 'LIQUIDATION'::public.transaction_type) then\n        perform public.apply_stock_change(v_item_id, v_tx.source_warehouse_id, -v_qty);\n      elsif v_tx.type = 'TRANSFER'::public.transaction_type then\n        perform public.apply_stock_change(v_item_id, v_tx.source_warehouse_id, -v_qty);\n        perform public.apply_stock_change(v_item_id, v_tx.target_warehouse_id, v_qty);\n      elsif v_tx.type = 'ADJUSTMENT'::public.transaction_type then\n        perform public.apply_stock_change(v_item_id, v_tx.target_warehouse_id, v_qty);\n      end if;\n    end loop;\n  end if;\n\n  update public.transactions\n  set status = p_status,\n      approver_id = p_approver_id\n  where id = p_transaction_id\n  returning * into v_tx;\n\n  return v_tx;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "transactions",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_transaction_id text, p_status transaction_status, p_approver_id uuid"
        },
        {
            "name": "process_workflow_instance",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.process_workflow_instance(p_instance_id uuid, p_action workflow_instance_action, p_user_id uuid, p_comment text DEFAULT ''::text)\n RETURNS workflow_instances\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_inst public.workflow_instances%rowtype;\n  v_current_user uuid := public.current_app_user_id();\n  v_next_node_id uuid;\n  v_next_node_type public.workflow_node_type;\n  v_prev_node_id uuid;\n  v_prev_node_type public.workflow_node_type;\nbegin\n  if v_current_user is null then\n    raise exception 'authentication required';\n  end if;\n  if p_user_id is distinct from v_current_user and not public.is_module_admin('WF') then\n    raise exception 'cannot act as another user';\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_inst\n  from public.workflow_instances\n  where id = p_instance_id\n  for update;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance not found: %', p_instance_id;\n  end if;\n  if v_inst.status <> 'RUNNING'::public.workflow_instance_status then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance is not running';\n  end if;\n  if v_inst.current_node_id is null then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance has no current node';\n  end if;\n\n  insert into public.workflow_instance_logs(instance_id, node_id, action, acted_by, comment)\n  values (p_instance_id, v_inst.current_node_id, p_action, p_user_id, coalesce(p_comment, ''));\n\n  if p_action = 'APPROVED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    select e.target_node_id, n.type\n      into v_next_node_id, v_next_node_type\n    from public.workflow_edges e\n    join public.workflow_nodes n on n.id = e.target_node_id\n    where e.source_node_id = v_inst.current_node_id\n    limit 1;\n\n    if v_next_node_id is null then\n      raise exception 'no next workflow node found';\n    end if;\n\n    update public.workflow_instances\n    set current_node_id = v_next_node_id,\n        status = case\n          when v_next_node_type = 'END'::public.workflow_node_type\n          then 'COMPLETED'::public.workflow_instance_status\n          else status\n        end,\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = p_instance_id\n    returning * into v_inst;\n  elsif p_action = 'REJECTED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    update public.workflow_instances\n    set status = 'REJECTED'::public.workflow_instance_status,\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = p_instance_id\n    returning * into v_inst;\n  elsif p_action = 'REVISION_REQUESTED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    select e.source_node_id, n.type\n      into v_prev_node_id, v_prev_node_type\n    from public.workflow_edges e\n    join public.workflow_nodes n on n.id = e.source_node_id\n    where e.target_node_id = v_inst.current_node_id\n    limit 1;\n\n    if v_prev_node_id is not null and v_prev_node_type = 'START'::public.workflow_node_type then\n      select e.target_node_id\n        into v_prev_node_id\n      from public.workflow_edges e\n      where e.source_node_id = v_prev_node_id\n      limit 1;\n    end if;\n\n    if v_prev_node_id is not null then\n      update public.workflow_instances\n      set current_node_id = v_prev_node_id,\n          updated_at = now()\n      where id = p_instance_id\n      returning * into v_inst;\n    end if;\n  end if;\n\n  return v_inst;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "workflow_instances",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_instance_id uuid, p_action workflow_instance_action, p_user_id uuid, p_comment text"
        },
        {
            "name": "process_workflow_instance_fast",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.process_workflow_instance_fast(p_instance_id uuid, p_action workflow_instance_action, p_user_id uuid, p_comment text DEFAULT ''::text, p_next_assignee_user_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)\n RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, template_id uuid, code text, title text, created_by uuid, current_node_id uuid, status workflow_instance_status, watchers text[], step_assignees jsonb, created_at timestamp with time zone, updated_at timestamp with time zone)\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_inst public.workflow_instances%rowtype;\n  v_current_user uuid := public.current_app_user_id();\n  v_actor public.users%rowtype;\n  v_template public.workflow_templates%rowtype;\n  v_current_node public.workflow_nodes%rowtype;\n  v_next_node_id uuid;\n  v_next_node_type public.workflow_node_type;\n  v_prev_node_id uuid;\n  v_prev_node_type public.workflow_node_type;\n  v_start_node_id uuid;\n  v_first_task_node_id uuid;\n  v_can_act boolean := false;\nbegin\n  if v_current_user is null then\n    raise exception 'authentication required';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_user_id is distinct from v_current_user and not public.is_module_admin('WF') then\n    raise exception 'cannot act as another user';\n  end if;\n\n  select u.* into v_actor\n  from public.users u\n  where u.id = p_user_id;\n\n  select wi.* into v_inst\n  from public.workflow_instances wi\n  where wi.id = p_instance_id\n  for update;\n\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance not found: %', p_instance_id;\n  end if;\n\n  if v_inst.status <> 'RUNNING'::public.workflow_instance_status then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance is not running';\n  end if;\n\n  if v_inst.current_node_id is null then\n    raise exception 'workflow instance has no current node';\n  end if;\n\n  select wn.* into v_current_node\n  from public.workflow_nodes wn\n  where wn.id = v_inst.current_node_id;\n\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'workflow current node not found: %', v_inst.current_node_id;\n  end if;\n\n  select wt.* into v_template\n  from public.workflow_templates wt\n  where wt.id = v_inst.template_id;\n\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'workflow template not found: %', v_inst.template_id;\n  end if;\n\n  select n.id into v_start_node_id\n  from public.workflow_nodes n\n  where n.template_id = v_inst.template_id\n    and n.type = 'START'::public.workflow_node_type\n  limit 1;\n\n  select e.target_node_id into v_first_task_node_id\n  from public.workflow_edges e\n  where e.source_node_id = v_start_node_id\n  limit 1;\n\n  v_can_act :=\n    public.is_module_admin('WF')\n    or coalesce(v_inst.step_assignees ->> v_inst.current_node_id::text, '') = p_user_id::text\n    or coalesce(v_current_node.config ->> 'assigneeUserId', '') = p_user_id::text\n    or (\n      v_actor.id is not null\n      and coalesce(v_current_node.config ->> 'assigneeRole', '') = v_actor.role::text\n    )\n    or p_user_id::text = any(coalesce(v_template.managers, '{}'::text[]))\n    or (\n      v_inst.created_by = p_user_id\n      and v_inst.current_node_id = v_first_task_node_id\n      and exists (\n        select 1\n        from public.workflow_instance_logs wil\n        where wil.instance_id = p_instance_id\n          and wil.action = 'REVISION_REQUESTED'::public.workflow_instance_action\n      )\n    );\n\n  if not v_can_act then\n    raise exception 'user is not allowed to process current workflow step';\n  end if;\n\n  insert into public.workflow_instance_logs(instance_id, node_id, action, acted_by, comment)\n  values (p_instance_id, v_inst.current_node_id, p_action, p_user_id, coalesce(p_comment, ''));\n\n  if p_action = 'APPROVED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    select e.target_node_id, n.type\n      into v_next_node_id, v_next_node_type\n    from public.workflow_edges e\n    join public.workflow_nodes n on n.id = e.target_node_id\n    where e.source_node_id = v_inst.current_node_id\n    limit 1;\n\n    if v_next_node_id is null then\n      raise exception 'no next workflow node found';\n    end if;\n\n    update public.workflow_instances wi\n    set current_node_id = v_next_node_id,\n        status = case\n          when v_next_node_type = 'END'::public.workflow_node_type\n          then 'COMPLETED'::public.workflow_instance_status\n          else wi.status\n        end,\n        step_assignees = case\n          when p_next_assignee_user_id is not null and v_next_node_type <> 'END'::public.workflow_node_type\n          then coalesce(wi.step_assignees, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(v_next_node_id::text, p_next_assignee_user_id::text)\n          else coalesce(wi.step_assignees, '{}'::jsonb)\n        end,\n        updated_at = now()\n    where wi.id = p_instance_id\n    returning wi.* into v_inst;\n  elsif p_action = 'REJECTED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    update public.workflow_instances wi\n    set status = 'REJECTED'::public.workflow_instance_status,\n        updated_at = now()\n    where wi.id = p_instance_id\n    returning wi.* into v_inst;\n  elsif p_action = 'REVISION_REQUESTED'::public.workflow_instance_action then\n    select e.source_node_id, n.type\n      into v_prev_node_id, v_prev_node_type\n    from public.workflow_edges e\n    join public.workflow_nodes n on n.id = e.source_node_id\n    where e.target_node_id = v_inst.current_node_id\n    limit 1;\n\n    if v_prev_node_id is not null and v_prev_node_type = 'START'::public.workflow_node_type then\n      select e.target_node_id\n        into v_prev_node_id\n      from public.workflow_edges e\n      where e.source_node_id = v_prev_node_id\n      limit 1;\n    end if;\n\n    if v_prev_node_id is not null then\n      update public.workflow_instances wi\n      set current_node_id = v_prev_node_id,\n          step_assignees = case\n            when p_next_assignee_user_id is not null\n            then coalesce(wi.step_assignees, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(v_prev_node_id::text, p_next_assignee_user_id::text)\n            else coalesce(wi.step_assignees, '{}'::jsonb)\n          end,\n          updated_at = now()\n      where wi.id = p_instance_id\n      returning wi.* into v_inst;\n    end if;\n  end if;\n\n  return query select\n    v_inst.id,\n    v_inst.template_id,\n    v_inst.code,\n    v_inst.title,\n    v_inst.created_by,\n    v_inst.current_node_id,\n    v_inst.status,\n    coalesce(v_inst.watchers, '{}'::text[]),\n    coalesce(v_inst.step_assignees, '{}'::jsonb),\n    v_inst.created_at,\n    v_inst.updated_at;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "TABLE(id uuid, template_id uuid, code text, title text, created_by uuid, current_node_id uuid, status workflow_instance_status, watchers text[], step_assignees jsonb, created_at timestamp with time zone, updated_at timestamp with time zone)",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_instance_id uuid, p_action workflow_instance_action, p_user_id uuid, p_comment text, p_next_assignee_user_id uuid"
        },
        {
            "name": "replace_project_staff_permissions",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.replace_project_staff_permissions(p_staff_id uuid, p_permission_type_ids uuid[], p_granted_by text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS void\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\n    BEGIN\n      DELETE FROM public.project_staff_permissions\n      WHERE staff_id = p_staff_id;\n\n      IF COALESCE(array_length(p_permission_type_ids, 1), 0) > 0 THEN\n        INSERT INTO public.project_staff_permissions (\n          staff_id,\n          permission_type_id,\n          is_active,\n          granted_by\n        )\n        SELECT\n          p_staff_id,\n          permission_type_id,\n          TRUE,\n          p_granted_by\n        FROM unnest(p_permission_type_ids) AS permission_type_id;\n      END IF;\n    END;\n    $function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "void",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "p_staff_id uuid, p_permission_type_ids uuid[], p_granted_by text"
        },
        {
            "name": "search_hrm_documents",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.search_hrm_documents(search_text text DEFAULT ''::text, doc_type_filter text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS SETOF hrm_documents\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$\nDECLARE\n  plain TEXT;\nBEGIN\n  IF search_text IS NULL OR search_text = '' THEN\n    RETURN QUERY\n    SELECT d.* FROM hrm_documents d\n    WHERE (doc_type_filter IS NULL OR d.doc_type = doc_type_filter)\n    ORDER BY d.created_at DESC\n    LIMIT 200;\n  ELSE\n    plain := unaccent(lower(search_text));\n    RETURN QUERY\n    SELECT d.* FROM hrm_documents d\n    LEFT JOIN employees e ON d.employee_id IS NOT NULL AND d.employee_id::uuid = e.id\n    WHERE \n      (doc_type_filter IS NULL OR d.doc_type = doc_type_filter)\n      AND (\n        -- Exact Vietnamese with diacritics\n        d.title ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR d.doc_number ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR d.file_name ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR d.sender ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR d.receiver ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR d.description ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR COALESCE(e.full_name, '') ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        OR COALESCE(e.employee_code, '') ILIKE '%' || search_text || '%'\n        -- Unaccented fallback (search \"bao gia\" finds \"báo giá\")\n        OR unaccent(lower(d.title)) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        OR unaccent(lower(d.file_name)) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        OR unaccent(lower(COALESCE(d.sender, ''))) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        OR unaccent(lower(COALESCE(d.receiver, ''))) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        OR unaccent(lower(COALESCE(d.description, ''))) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        OR unaccent(lower(COALESCE(e.full_name, ''))) LIKE '%' || plain || '%'\n        -- Full-text search vector\n        OR d.search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', search_text)\n      )\n    ORDER BY d.created_at DESC\n    LIMIT 100;\n  END IF;\nEND;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "SETOF hrm_documents",
            "security_definer": false,
            "identity_arguments": "search_text text, doc_type_filter text"
        },
        {

            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_boq_reconciliation_updated_at()\n RETURNS trigger\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\nAS $function$\nbegin\n  new.updated_at = now();\n  return new;\nend;\n$function$\n",

        },

        {
            "name": "sync_auth_user_profile",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_auth_user_profile()\n RETURNS trigger\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public', 'auth'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_role text := coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'role', ''), 'EMPLOYEE');\n  v_username text := coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'username', ''), split_part(new.email, '@', 1));\n  v_name text := coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'name', ''), v_username);\n  v_phone text := nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'phone', '');\nbegin\n  if v_role not in ('ADMIN', 'WAREHOUSE_KEEPER', 'EMPLOYEE') then\n    v_role := 'EMPLOYEE';\n  end if;\n\n  insert into public.users (\n    id,\n    auth_id,\n    name,\n    email,\n    username,\n    phone,\n    role,\n    avatar,\n    assigned_warehouse_id,\n    allowed_modules,\n    admin_modules,\n    allowed_sub_modules,\n    admin_sub_modules\n  )\n  values (\n    new.id,\n    new.id,\n    v_name,\n    new.email,\n    v_username,\n    v_phone,\n    v_role::public.user_role,\n    coalesce(nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'avatar', ''), 'https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=' || coalesce(new.email, new.id::text)),\n    nullif(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'assignedWarehouseId', ''),\n    case\n      when v_role = 'ADMIN' then null\n      else array(select jsonb_array_elements_text(coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->'allowedModules', '[]'::jsonb)))\n    end,\n    case\n      when v_role = 'ADMIN' then null\n      else array(select jsonb_array_elements_text(coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->'adminModules', '[]'::jsonb)))\n    end,\n    case\n      when v_role = 'ADMIN' then null\n      else coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->'allowedSubModules', '{}'::jsonb)\n    end,\n    case\n      when v_role = 'ADMIN' then null\n      else coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->'adminSubModules', '{}'::jsonb)\n    end\n  )\n  on conflict (id) do update\n  set auth_id = coalesce(public.users.auth_id, excluded.auth_id),\n      name = excluded.name,\n      email = excluded.email,\n      username = excluded.username,\n      phone = excluded.phone,\n      role = excluded.role,\n      avatar = excluded.avatar,\n      assigned_warehouse_id = excluded.assigned_warehouse_id,\n      allowed_modules = excluded.allowed_modules,\n      admin_modules = excluded.admin_modules,\n      allowed_sub_modules = excluded.allowed_sub_modules,\n      admin_sub_modules = excluded.admin_sub_modules;\n\n  -- BỎ ĐOẠN INSERT INTO public.employees NÀY (Đã xóa)\n\n  return new;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "trigger",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": ""
        },
        {
            "name": "transfer_asset_stock",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.transfer_asset_stock(p_asset_id text, p_from_stock_id text, p_qty integer, p_to_warehouse_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_to_user_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_reason text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_date text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS asset_transfers\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_from public.asset_location_stocks%rowtype;\n  v_target_id text;\n  v_asset public.assets%rowtype;\n  v_transfer public.asset_transfers%rowtype;\n  v_user public.users%rowtype;\n  v_to_user_name text;\n  v_from_label text;\n  v_to_label text;\nbegin\n  if not public.is_module_admin('TS') then\n    raise exception 'insufficient privilege to transfer asset stock';\n  end if;\n  if p_qty <= 0 then\n    raise exception 'transfer quantity must be positive';\n  end if;\n  if nullif(p_to_warehouse_id, '') is null and nullif(p_to_user_id, '') is null then\n    raise exception 'destination is required';\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_from\n  from public.asset_location_stocks\n  where id = p_from_stock_id and asset_id = p_asset_id\n  for update;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'source stock not found';\n  end if;\n  if v_from.qty < p_qty then\n    raise exception 'insufficient asset stock: available %, requested %', v_from.qty, p_qty;\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_asset from public.assets where id = p_asset_id;\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'asset not found';\n  end if;\n\n  select * into v_user from public.users where id = public.current_app_user_id();\n  select name into v_to_user_name from public.users where id::text = nullif(p_to_user_id, '');\n\n  update public.asset_location_stocks\n  set qty = qty - p_qty,\n      updated_at = now()\n  where id = p_from_stock_id;\n\n  select id into v_target_id\n  from public.asset_location_stocks\n  where asset_id = p_asset_id\n    and warehouse_id is not distinct from nullif(p_to_warehouse_id, '')\n    and assigned_to_user_id is not distinct from nullif(p_to_user_id, '')\n  limit 1\n  for update;\n\n  if v_target_id is null then\n    insert into public.asset_location_stocks (\n      asset_id, warehouse_id, qty, assigned_to_user_id, assigned_to_name, updated_at\n    )\n    values (\n      p_asset_id, nullif(p_to_warehouse_id, ''), p_qty,\n      nullif(p_to_user_id, ''), v_to_user_name, now()\n    );\n  else\n    update public.asset_location_stocks\n    set qty = qty + p_qty,\n        assigned_to_name = coalesce(v_to_user_name, assigned_to_name),\n        updated_at = now()\n    where id = v_target_id;\n  end if;\n\n  select coalesce(v_from.assigned_to_name, w.name, 'Không xác định')\n    into v_from_label\n  from (select 1) s\n  left join public.warehouses w on w.id = v_from.warehouse_id;\n\n  select coalesce(v_to_user_name, w.name, 'Không xác định')\n    into v_to_label\n  from (select 1) s\n  left join public.warehouses w on w.id = nullif(p_to_warehouse_id, '');\n\n  insert into public.asset_transfers (\n    code, asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, qty,\n    from_warehouse_id, from_location_label,\n    to_warehouse_id, to_location_label,\n    received_by_user_id, received_by_name,\n    date, reason, status, performed_by, performed_by_name, created_at\n  )\n  values (\n    public.next_asset_transfer_code(), p_asset_id, v_asset.code, v_asset.name, p_qty,\n    v_from.warehouse_id, v_from_label,\n    nullif(p_to_warehouse_id, ''), v_to_label,\n    nullif(p_to_user_id, ''), v_to_user_name,\n    coalesce(nullif(p_date, ''), now()::date::text), p_reason, 'completed',\n    public.current_app_user_id()::text, coalesce(v_user.name, v_user.username), now()\n  )\n  returning * into v_transfer;\n\n  return v_transfer;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "asset_transfers",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_asset_id text, p_from_stock_id text, p_qty integer, p_to_warehouse_id text, p_to_user_id text, p_reason text, p_date text"
        },
        {
            "name": "transition_daily_log_status",
            "schema": "public",
            "definition": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.transition_daily_log_status(p_log_id text, p_status text, p_requested_verifier_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_requested_verifier_name text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_rejection_reason text DEFAULT NULL::text)\n RETURNS void\n LANGUAGE plpgsql\n SECURITY DEFINER\n SET search_path TO 'public'\nAS $function$\ndeclare\n  v_log public.daily_logs%rowtype;\n  v_user_id text := public.current_app_user_id()::text;\n  v_is_admin boolean := public.is_admin();\n  v_actor_name text;\n  v_owner_id text;\n  v_target_verifier_id text;\n  v_can_verify boolean;\nbegin\n  if v_user_id is null then\n    raise exception 'Không xác định được người dùng đang thao tác.';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status not in ('submitted', 'verified', 'rejected') then\n    raise exception 'Trạng thái nhật ký không hợp lệ: %', p_status;\n  end if;\n\n  select *\n  into v_log\n  from public.daily_logs\n  where id = p_log_id\n  for update;\n\n  if not found then\n    raise exception 'Không tìm thấy nhật ký công trường.';\n  end if;\n\n  select coalesce(u.name, u.username, u.email, u.id::text)\n  into v_actor_name\n  from public.users u\n  where u.id::text = v_user_id;\n\n  v_owner_id := coalesce(v_log.created_by_id, v_log.submitted_by_id, v_log.submitted_by);\n  v_target_verifier_id := coalesce(v_log.requested_verifier_id, v_log.submitted_to_user_id);\n\n  if p_status = 'submitted' then\n    if coalesce(v_log.status, 'draft') not in ('draft', 'rejected') then\n      raise exception 'Chỉ nhật ký nháp hoặc bị trả lại mới được gửi xác nhận.';\n    end if;\n\n    if not v_is_admin and coalesce(v_owner_id, '') <> v_user_id then\n      raise exception 'Chỉ người lập nhật ký mới được gửi xác nhận.';\n    end if;\n\n    if nullif(p_requested_verifier_id, '') is null then\n      raise exception 'Vui lòng chọn người xác nhận nhật ký.';\n    end if;\n\n    if p_requested_verifier_id = v_user_id and not v_is_admin then\n      raise exception 'Người xác nhận phải khác người gửi.';\n    end if;\n\n    if not public.daily_log_user_has_project_permission(\n      p_requested_verifier_id,\n      v_log.project_id::text,\n      v_log.construction_site_id::text,\n      'verify'\n    ) then\n      raise exception 'Người được chọn chưa có quyền verify trong Tổ chức dự án.';\n    end if;\n\n    update public.daily_logs\n    set\n      status = 'submitted',\n      verified = false,\n      submitted_by = v_user_id,\n      submitted_by_id = v_user_id,\n      submitted_at = now(),\n      requested_verifier_id = p_requested_verifier_id,\n      submitted_to_user_id = p_requested_verifier_id,\n      requested_verifier_name = nullif(p_requested_verifier_name, ''),\n      rejected_by = null,\n      rejected_by_id = null,\n      rejected_at = null,\n      rejection_reason = null\n    where id = p_log_id;\n\n    return;\n  end if;\n\n  if coalesce(v_log.status, 'draft') <> 'submitted' then\n    raise exception 'Chỉ nhật ký đang chờ xác nhận mới được duyệt hoặc trả lại.';\n  end if;\n\n  v_can_verify := v_is_admin\n    or (\n      nullif(v_target_verifier_id, '') is not null\n      and v_target_verifier_id = v_user_id\n      and public.daily_log_user_has_project_permission(\n        v_user_id,\n        v_log.project_id::text,\n        v_log.construction_site_id::text,\n        'verify'\n      )\n    )\n    or (\n      nullif(v_target_verifier_id, '') is null\n      and public.daily_log_user_has_project_permission(\n        v_user_id,\n        v_log.project_id::text,\n        v_log.construction_site_id::text,\n        'verify'\n      )\n    );\n\n  if not v_can_verify then\n    raise exception 'Bạn không phải người được giao xác nhận nhật ký này.';\n  end if;\n\n  if p_status = 'verified' then\n    update public.daily_logs\n    set\n      status = 'verified',\n      verified = true,\n      verified_by = coalesce(v_actor_name, v_user_id),\n      verified_by_id = v_user_id,\n      verified_at = now(),\n      rejected_by = null,\n      rejected_by_id = null,\n      rejected_at = null,\n      rejection_reason = null\n    where id = p_log_id;\n  else\n    update public.daily_logs\n    set\n      status = 'rejected',\n      verified = false,\n      rejected_by = coalesce(v_actor_name, v_user_id),\n      rejected_by_id = v_user_id,\n      rejected_at = now(),\n      rejection_reason = coalesce(nullif(p_rejection_reason, ''), 'Cần bổ sung/kiểm tra lại')\n    where id = p_log_id;\n  end if;\nend;\n$function$\n",
            "volatility": "v",
            "return_type": "void",
            "security_definer": true,
            "identity_arguments": "p_log_id text, p_status text, p_requested_verifier_id text, p_requested_verifier_name text, p_rejection_reason text"
        },
